name: bus-ticket-backend
description: Backend for Inter-city Bus Ticketing System

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,TRIP,SEAT" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow" "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=trip-service" "npm run dev --workspace=seat-service"
scripts.kill: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000,50051,50052 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Killed all service ports'"
